title: Green Star Balloon,16Pcs Star Foil Balloons Set with 22Inch Explosion Spike Cone Balloons and 10Inch Quadrangle Helium Balloon for Birthday Wedding Baby Shower Party Decorations
features: Package: This set includes 6pcs 22inch green explosion star foil balloons, 4pcs 10inch green star foil balloons, 6pcs 10inch green four angle star balloons, and a ribbon. Perfect for creating a dazzling party atmosphere.
Material: Made of high-quality, non-toxic aluminum foil, these balloons are reusable and designed to hold air for extended periods, ensuring your decorations stay vibrant throughout the event.
Easy to Use: Featuring a self-sealing design, the balloons can be effortlessly inflated using a pump or straw. No complicated assembly required, making decoration hassle-free and efficient.

Versatile for Any Celebration: Perfect for birthdays, weddings, baby showers, gender reveals, anniversaries, bridal showers, engagements, and more. Whether indoors or outdoors, these star-shaped balloons add a festive touch to any occasion.

Note: To extend balloon life, avoid over-inflating and keep away from sharp objects. Small color variations may occur due to different production batches, but this does not affect their quality or appearance.
